forgottenPasswordRequestRoute.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

forgottenPasswordRoute.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

forgottenPasswordSuccessRoute.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

forgottenPasswordSuccess.heading: Forgot password
forgottenPasswordSuccess.info1: If you have an account with us, we sent you an email with a link to reset your password. If it doesn't arrive, check your spam or resend it.
forgottenPasswordSuccess.info2: To reset your password, please open your email address and click the reset link.

passwordResetRoute.description: Choose a new secure password and enter it again to confirm.

passwordResetMissingToken.alertTitle: Unable to Reset Password – Missing Security Token
passwordResetMissingToken.errorTokenNotFound: To reset your password, click the button below and complete the form.

passwordResetSuccessRoute.description: Choose a new secure password and enter it again to confirm.

passwordResetSuccess.heading: Your Password Has Been Reset
passwordResetSuccess.info: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
